languages.text: "Ого, как они кричали-кричали, а теперь и затихли. Что? Неужели никто не слышал?"

traits.locale_text: "Ого, как они кричали-кричали, а теперь и затихли. Что? Неужели никто не слышал?"
"Ого, как они кричали-кричали, а теперь и затихли. Что? Неужели никто не слышал?"

languages.text: "Oh, they were screaming, screaming so very loudly, but they fell silent now. What? Did nobody hear them?"
languages.original_text: "Ого, как они кричали-кричали, а теперь и затихли. Что? Неужели никто не слышал?"

traits.locale_text: "Oh, they were screaming, screaming so very loudly, but they fell silent now. What? Did nobody hear them?"
"Oh, they were screaming, screaming so very loudly, but they fell silent now. What? Did nobody hear them?"
"Oh, they were screaming, screaming so very loudly, but they fell silent now. What? Did nobody hear them?"

languages.text: "Oh, sie haben geschrien, so laut geschrien, aber jetzt sind sie verstummt. Aber was? Hat sie denn niemand gehört?"
languages.original_text: "Oh, they were screaming, screaming so very loudly, but they fell silent now. What? Did nobody hear them?"

languages.text: "Oh, ils criaient, ils criaient très fort, mais ils se sont tus maintenant. Mais ils se sont tus. Personne ne les a entendus ?"
languages.original_text: "Oh, they were screaming, screaming so very loudly, but they fell silent now. What? Did nobody hear them?"

languages.text: "哦，他们在尖叫，叫得非常响亮，但他们现在安静下来了。怎么了？没人听见吗？"
languages.original_text: "Oh, they were screaming, screaming so very loudly, but they fell silent now. What? Did nobody hear them?"

languages.text: "Oh, estaban gritando, gritando muy fuerte, pero ahora se callaron. ¿Qué? ¿Nadie los oyó?"
languages.original_text: "Oh, they were screaming, screaming so very loudly, but they fell silent now. What? Did nobody hear them?"

languages.text: "ああ、彼らは叫んでいた、とても大きな声で叫んでいたが、今は静かになった。何？誰にも聞こえなかったのか？
languages.original_text: "Oh, they were screaming, screaming so very loudly, but they fell silent now. What? Did nobody hear them?"

languages.text: "Oh, çığlık atıyorlardı, çok yüksek sesle çığlık atıyorlardı, ama şimdi sustular. Ne oldu? Kimse onları duymadı mı?"
languages.original_text: "Oh, they were screaming, screaming so very loudly, but they fell silent now. What? Did nobody hear them?"
